name: Perplexity WebUI Search
description: Agent Skill — interroge Perplexity via le WebUI avec Playwright, zéro clé API.
highlights: Browser automation — lance Chromium, navigue Perplexity, soumet une query
Multi-agent — compatible OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex CLI
Retry logic — handle clipboard, slow responses, transient failures (3 retries)
